name: GetSimulinkModelName
title: GetSimulinkModelName
syntax: long GetSimulinkModelName( char[] buffer, dword bufferSize);
description: Gets the name of the Simulink model.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The name of the Simulink model will be written to this buffer.

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: The size of buffer in bytes.

return: On success 0, otherwise a value unequal to zero.
